title: International Registered Students
content:
International Registered Students

Attendance

Okan Homepage

Academic

Attendance

MENU

Students must attend every course –theoretical, practical or laboratory work- of the program they are enrolled at, take the exams and fulfil the requirements necessary for achieving the course.

Students who do not attend a minimum 70% of the theoretical courses and 80% of the practical courses will be considered as absent and will not be authorised to take the final exam. Students who fail a course for not fulfilling minimum attendance requirement are obliged to meet the attendance requirement when they re-take the course.
